panel.background: linear-gradient(150deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02) 30%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 58%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
panel.boxShadow: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.043) 0px 2px 10px 0px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.075) 0px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px inset, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px inset, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px inset, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px inset, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px inset, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px inset

panelHeader.background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.353), rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.19)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
panelHeader.boxShadow: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6) 0px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.32) 0px 6px 10px -6px inset, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) 0px -1px 0px 0px inset

panelBody.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
panelBody.boxShadow: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.28) 0px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) 1px 0px 0px 0px inset, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) -1px 0px 0px 0px inset, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06) 0px -1px 0px 0px inset
